payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_9c2370dbf3264efe90ff6179', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "\\"\\"\\"Basic calculator module with arithmetic functions.\\"\\"\\"\\n\\n\\ndef add(a, b):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Add two numbers.\\"\\"\\"\\n    return a + b\\n\\n\\ndef subtract(a, b):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Subtract b from a.\\"\\"\\"\\n    return a - b\\n\\n\\ndef multiply(a, b):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Multiply two numbers.\\"\\"\\"\\n    return a * b\\n\\n\\ndef divide(a, b):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Divide a by b.\\"\\"\\"\\n    return a / b\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\"__main__\\":\\n    # Demo calculations\\n    print(\\"Calculator Demo:\\")\\n    print(f\\"add(10, 5) = {add(10, 5)}\\")\\n    print(f\\"subtract(10, 5) = {subtract(10, 5)}\\")\\n    print(f\\"multiply(10, 5) = {multiply(10, 5)}\\")\\n    print(f\\"divide(10, 5) = {divide(10, 5)}\\")", "filename": "calculator.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
